name: render.yaml • Node backend
content:
services:
  - type: web
    name: my-node-api
    env: node
    plan: free
    region: oregon
    rootDir: server
    buildCommand: npm install
    startCommand: npm start
    autoDeploy: true
    envVars:
      - key: NODE_ENV
        value: production
      - key: PORT
        value: 10000

name: Dockerfile • Python Flask
content:
FROM python:3.12-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
ENV PORT=8080
CMD ["gunicorn", "-b", "0.0.0.0:8080", "app:app"]

name: Dockerfile • Node API
content:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev
COPY . .
ENV PORT=8080
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["npm", "start"]

name: codemagic.yaml • Flutter APK
content:
workflows:
  android-release:
    name: Android Release
    environment:
      flutter: stable
      vars:
        PACKAGE_NAME: com.example.app
    scripts:
      - flutter pub get
      - flutter build apk --release
    artifacts:
      - build/**/outputs/**/*.apk
    publishing:
      email:
        recipients:
          - your@email.com

name: Docker Compose • API + Redis
content:
version: '3.9'
services:
  api:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
    depends_on:
      - redis
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

name: GitHub Actions • Deploy check
content:
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test --if-present
      - run: npm run build --if-present

name: Nginx • SPA fallback
Build checklist • Backend
content:
1. package.json / requirements.txt check karo
2. PORT env variable support confirm karo
3. Root directory sahi set karo
4. Build command local run karo
5. Start command test karo
6. Secrets ko .env ya provider env me shift karo
7. Health route (/health) banana useful hai
8. Repo branch aur auto deploy rule verify karo

name: Build checklist • APK
content:
1. Android package id unique rakho
2. keystore / signing config ready rakho
3. appId / workflowId build provider me verify karo
4. Flutter or Gradle cache clear karke test build karo
5. Release notes aur versionCode bump karo
6. Artifact URL ko session board me pin kar lo

name: Railway GraphQL sample
Render service notes
content: Render API token ko bearer header me bhejo. Service create karne se pehle repo access, build command, start command aur region verify karo. Deploy hone ke baad public URL ko ZIPPilot deploy tracker me add kar do taaki frontend se open kar sako.

name: Mobile env example
content:
API_BASE_URL=https://api.example.com
APP_NAME=Royal Creation
ANDROID_PACKAGE=com.royal.creation
MINIFY_ENABLED=true
SENTRY_DSN=replace_me
